scope: fresh-seed read-only probe-level decomposition of the mixed G3 gradient credit; no model training, optimizer step, parameter mutation, checkpoint selection, blind-seed reuse, formal validation, or test access
scientific_question: are opposite return-credit directions explained by whether the source model already solves each probe, and can the six causal transport confidence features distinguish those directions without room or target metadata
audited_model_state: the exact step-0 M1j initialization from the frozen M1j pilot; the trained M1j checkpoint is not loaded

probe_gradient.loss: one unreduced sensory cross-entropy per return-conflict probe
probe_gradient.parameter_scope: final transport Linear(8,1) weight and bias, exactly 9 dimensions
probe_gradient.computation: one torch.autograd.grad batched VJP per batch with an identity grad-output matrix and is_grads_batched=True
probe_gradient.direction: negative unit gradient, representing the infinitesimal probe-CE descent direction
probe_gradient.causal_event_scope: history-available transport proposals in the same episode, in the final return segment, at or before the probed token
probe_gradient.support_label: mean first-order transport-logit change over causal events is greater than +1e-10
probe_gradient.reject_label: mean first-order transport-logit change over causal events is less than -1e-10
probe_gradient.neutral_label: absolute mean first-order transport-logit change is at most 1e-10

post_forward_labels.source_correct: step-0 M1j argmax equals the sensory target
post_forward_labels.wrong_room_error: step-0 M1j argmax equals batch.other_room_targets on an incorrect probe
post_forward_labels.context_pair: current transported context cosine to the correct versus wrong earlier reference, using immutable base_context anchors constructed only after forward
post_forward_labels.reference_room_and_target_index: generator metadata used only for subgroup auditing after forward; never a model or feature-probe input

causal_transport_features: one minus normalized history attention entropy
history evidence minus learned null similarity

feature_probe.input: mean raw six-dimensional causal transport feature over each probe's causal return events
feature_probe.forbidden_inputs: prediction logits, target, correctness, room id, segment id, target index, sensory identity, position, place id, return metadata, pfc_hidden, and Transformer KV
feature_probe.standardization: training-fold mean and standard deviation only; constant dimensions use scale 1
feature_probe.metric: balanced accuracy pooled over all held-out predictions
feature_probe.model_effect: the diagnostic probe is fit on CPU after all frozen model forwards and never changes or feeds the M1j model

prohibited_operations: optimizer construction or optimizer step on M1j
loss.backward that accumulates M1j parameter gradients
using G3 seed17181 or M1j blind seed16180
feeding any post-forward label or metadata into M1j or the six-feature probe
post_result_rule: classify once with frozen thresholds; do not tune on seed18182; any trained follow-up or feature redesign requires a new protocol and new train, monitor, and blind generator seeds
